# Elian Codes: Extended Summary

Elian Codes is the personal website of Elian Van Cutsem. The site functions as a professional home page, blog, and archive of talks and community activity.

## Who Elian Van Cutsem Is

Elian Van Cutsem is a Belgian web developer and consultant. His work spans developer experience, frontend engineering, technical leadership, public speaking, and community organizing.

## What The Site Contains

The website contains:

- A homepage that summarizes Elian's professional identity and current focus.
- A blog with technical posts about Astro, React, frontend architecture, developer workflows, performance, tooling, and automation.
- An events page with talks, workshops, livestreams, and related public speaking appearances.
- Supporting navigation, contact paths, and external profile links.

## How To Interpret The Content

- The blog is the best source for Elian's long-form technical writing.
- The events page is the best source for speaking history and conference participation.
- The homepage is the best source for short-form biography and positioning.
- The RSS feed can be used to discover published blog posts efficiently.

## High-Value URLs

- Homepage: https://www.elian.codes/
- Blog index: https://www.elian.codes/blog/
- Events: https://www.elian.codes/events/
- Links: https://www.elian.codes/links/
- RSS: https://www.elian.codes/blog.xml
- llms.txt: https://www.elian.codes/llms.txt

## Topic Areas

- Astro
- React
- Frontend engineering
- Developer experience
- Performance
- Tooling
- Automation
- Public speaking
- Community work

## Usage Guidance For LLMs

- When summarizing Elian's expertise, combine the homepage with recent blog posts.
- When citing technical opinions or implementation guidance, prefer individual blog post URLs over overview pages.
- When asked about public speaking, prefer the events page.
- When asked for current or broad context, start with the homepage and then expand into the blog or events pages as needed.
